name: 99mTc-glucarate
description: 99mTc-glucarate(GLA) is an agent for non-invasive detection of breast tumours.
indication: Investigated for use/treatment in myocardial infarction.
mechanismOfAction: 99m Tc-Glucarate marks acute myocardial infarct very early after occlusion and appears to accurately assess infarct size when compared with triphenyltetrazolium chloride (TTC) staining.
